vibe.overall: Enterprise B2B SaaS — clean, minimal, dark-mode-first. Premium revenue operations tool, not a consumer app. Understated and professional with lots of negative space, muted colors, no flashy gradients or illustrations. Think Linear meets a sales ops platform.
vibe.tone: Confident, direct, no-fluff. Written for revenue leaders and ops teams. Avoids hype words. Uses phrases like 'sales execution layer', 'governed handoffs', 'pipeline health'.
vibe.feel: Quiet authority. The design doesn't try to impress — it communicates competence. Monochrome palette says 'we're serious'. Generous whitespace says 'we're not desperate for your attention'.

visualIdentity.uiSystem: shadcn/ui (base-nova style) + Radix primitives + Tailwind CSS v4
visualIdentity.logoTreatment: Plain text 'KAGAN' — font-semibold tracking-tight, no icon or graphic

colorSystem.approach: oklch color space, fully monochrome/neutral (zero chroma). Only splashes of color: destructive red and one blue sidebar accent in dark mode.

navbar.style: Sticky top-0, h-14, border-b border-border/60, backdrop-blur bg-background/80

footer.col1: KAGAN + tagline: 'Private AI for sales execution and lead conversion.'

hero.title: Always-on lead capture and conversion
hero.subtitle: KAGAN runs your sales motion when your team is in meetings—structured capture, on-brand automated replies, and governed handoffs to humans.
hero.visualEffect: Subtle radial gradient overlay — ellipse 80% 50% at 50% -20%, rgba(120,119,198,0.18) fading to transparent
hero.layout: Left-aligned text block. Eyebrow → H1 (max-w-3xl) → subtitle (max-w-2xl) → two buttons in a row. Section has border-b, generous padding (pt-16 pb-20, sm: pt-24 pb-28).

features.sectionSubtitle: Workflow automation tied to your pipeline—not a generic chat window.
features.layout: 2-column grid (sm+), single column mobile. Section bordered top and bottom.

cards.title: Lead capture
cards.description: Ingest inbound interest from forms and connected channels with fields mapped to your CRM stages.

cards.title: Automated replies
cards.description: Acknowledgment, scheduling nudges, and follow-up cadences that match your tone and policies.

cards.title: Workflow automation
cards.description: Routing, qualification prompts, and clear rules for when a deal needs a human owner.

cards.title: Activity visibility
cards.description: Response times, funnel movement, and audit-friendly views of what KAGAN executed.

features.cardStyle: border-border/60, bg-card/40, hover:border-border with transition. Icon sits in a 40px square with rounded-lg border and bg-background/50.

pricing.sectionSubtitle: One plan. Full platform access. Custom integrations billed only when you need them.

mainPlan.name: KAGAN Platform
mainPlan.description: Private AI sales execution, standard integrations, dashboard, and reporting.
mainPlan.footnote: Volume limits and enterprise options available during onboarding.
mainPlan.cardStyle: border-primary/25, bg-card/50, full width. Price is text-4xl font-semibold. Checkmark list with Lucide Check icon.

customIntegrations.label: Custom integrations
customIntegrations.description: Tailored connections to proprietary tools, legacy systems, or non-catalog APIs.
customIntegrations.cardStyle: border-dashed, bg-muted/20, full width. Smaller price text-2xl.

bottomCta.title: Ready to run conversion as infrastructure?
bottomCta.subtitle: Share your stack and pipeline—we'll map standard integrations and flag anything that needs a custom build.
bottomCta.layout: Flex row on sm+ — text block left, button right. border-t, bg-muted/20, py-16.

designPatterns.sectionDividers: Thin borders: border-b border-border/40 or border-t border-border/40. Never thick lines or colored dividers.
designPatterns.cardStyle: Semi-transparent backgrounds (bg-card/40, bg-card/50, bg-muted/20). Faint borders (border-border/60). Subtle hover: border goes slightly more visible. No shadows.
designPatterns.sectionSpacing: py-20 sm:py-24 for marketing sections. p-4 md:p-6 for dashboard areas.
designPatterns.emptyStates: Dashed border card with centered icon, title, description, optional CTA
designPatterns.responsiveness: Mobile-first. Single col → 2-col on sm. Navbar collapses to sheet menu. Dashboard sidebar hides on mobile.
designPatterns.transparency: Backgrounds and borders consistently use opacity — bg-card/40, bg-background/80, border-border/60. Creates depth without heavy layering.

brandCopyAndMessaging.brandVoice: Enterprise-grade, zero buzzwords. Speaks to ops teams and revenue leaders who are tired of vaporware. Uses specific operational language: 'sales execution', 'pipeline', 'governed handoffs', 'revenue operations', 'audit-friendly'.
valuePropositions: Runs your sales motion when your team is in meetings
Structured capture mapped to CRM stages
On-brand automated replies matching your tone and policies
Governed handoffs to humans with clear rules
brandCopyAndMessaging.ctaStyle: Action-oriented but not aggressive: 'Book a conversation', 'Talk to sales', 'View pricing'. Never 'Get started free', 'Try now', or 'Sign up'. Implies a sales-led motion, not product-led growth.
brandCopyAndMessaging.contactPageTone: Professional B2B: 'Tell us about your stack and pipeline. We'll follow up with next steps and integration scope.'
brandCopyAndMessaging.pricingPhilosophy: Transparent and simple. One plan, one price, add-ons clearly explained. 'Straightforward pricing' — no tiers, no feature gating, no calculator.
brandCopyAndMessaging.conversionMessage: Ready to run conversion as infrastructure?
brandCopyAndMessaging.footerTagline: Private AI for sales execution and lead conversion.
